text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. They're not budging! Perfection!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Sweep. Are you checking your cleats right
now?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Sure am. I just got finished re-fastening them nice
and tight!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hm, are you sure they're on tight? Here, let me
take a look.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey! W-wait a second!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Well, this is your first real race, isn't it? I'll make
sure they're on properly for you!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Sweep! I heard you're running in the next
debut race! Do you know what time you have to
head out?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I just checked again this morning! I
even calculated what time I've gotta wake up.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I hear you. But even if you think you're set the
day before the race, you might forget if you don't
write it down. Make sure you stay on top of it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What? I'm pretty sure I can remember something
like that without writing it down.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it isn't Sweep! Fuji said your debut race is
coming up soon.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Are you eating properly? Some people lose their
appetite from all the stress the day before a race,
you know.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I know you're not in my dorm, but since this is a
special occasion, I could prepare a special lunch
for you.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Agggh! I'm eating fine. I can take care of myself!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oho... Well, someone certainly seems grumpy.
But no matter.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You just leave it to me! I'll show you what I can do
on the day of the race!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I said nooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of her debut race rolls around, and
Sweep Tosho shows up on time. However...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go to meet Sweep Tosho and find her alongside
Hishi Amazon and Air Groove, who is also known
as the Empress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon was considered among the best
racers for a time, having won races like the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup and performing well in the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove won the Japanese Oaks and was the
first runner from the Tiara tour to win the autumn
Tenno Sho in over a decade.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Sweep. Do you have your lunch? How about
your handkerchief and tissues? You didn't forget
anything, did you?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Enough with the handkerchiefs. How many times
do I have to hear it?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hey, Sweep.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
When you get to the racecourse, make sure you
inspect the turf first thing. Races begin in the
preparation phase.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Enooouuugh alreaaady!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I already know! Stop bothering me! Don't say
anything else!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hey now. We're all just worried about y—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I don't need anyone to worry about me! I'm gonna
win and it's gonna be easy!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Blaaah! Let's go, Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A surly Sweep Tosho and I manage to make it
over to the racecourse, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Saying the wrong thing could potentially make
things worse. I frantically try to come up with a
way to make her feel better.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt... Bzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...What do you want, Dad?

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Father
text_block_list.text:
Sweepy! You're up! Oh, what a relief! You've got
your race tod—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I didn't sleep in! BYE!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but have a bad feeling about today's
race.
